title: GetOrderInfoResponse
description: Detailed information about a specific order retrieved via the orders lookup endpoint.

accountId.description: The account identifier associated with this order.

orderId.description: The unique identifier of the order.

action.description: The order action. Possible values: open, close.

transaction.description: The transaction direction. Possible values: buy, sell, sellShort, buyToCover.

type.description: The order type. Possible values: mkt, mit.

etoroOrderTypeId.description: The internal eToro order type identifier.

orderCurrency.description: The currency used for the order.

requestedAmount.description: The requested monetary amount for the order.

requestedUnits.description: The requested number of units for the order.

requestedContracts.description: The requested number of contracts for the order.

frozenAmount.description: The amount frozen/reserved for the order including costs.

requestedTriggerRate.description: The trigger rate for limit or stop orders.

openStopLossRate.description: The stop-loss rate at order open.

openTakeProfitRate.description: The take-profit rate at order open.

stopLossType.description: The stop-loss type. Possible values: fixed, trailing.

totalCosts.description: Total costs associated with the order.

positionsToClose.description: List of position IDs to close as part of a close order.

positionExecutions.description: List of position executions resulting from this order.

requestTime.description: The timestamp when the order was requested.

lastUpdate.description: The timestamp of the last update to the order.

openActionType.description: The action type that initiated the order.

requestType.description: The request sizing type. Possible values: byAmount, byUnits, byContracts.
